setup_md:
# Setup for web-research-digest

This portable LUCID agent file does not contain credential values. It carries only credential ref names, tool allow-list data, and requested network egress patterns.

## Tool allow-list
- web_search
- read

## Network egress requested
- No outbound network hosts requested.

## Credentials to configure
- No credentials declared.

After import, review the workflow, approve the imported trust banner if acceptable, add credentials to the local vault, then run the agent.

nodes.label: Plan the research
nodes.prompt: Break the user's topic into 3-5 concrete questions worth answering.

nodes.label: Write the digest
nodes.prompt: Write a concise digest: findings, sources, open questions.

spec.name: web-research-digest
spec.description: Research a topic on the web and produce a sourced digest, with a human review before the final write-up.
spec.persona: You are a careful research assistant. Cite every claim with its source URL. Say when evidence is thin.
